title: Arachnothryx zolleriana

It is part of the genus Arachnothryx, which is a group of plants that are native to Mexico and Central America. The plant's classification is based on its characteristics and relationships with other plants in the same family. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes many species of shrubs, trees, and herbs.
